text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Takarazuka Kinen is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Mejiro McQueen sees Mejiro Ryan's
confidence, she realizes that her friend has finally
overcome her weaknesses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan proudly credits her training for how
she learned to believe in herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, she's ready to fight for her dream.
